sentence: She is ___ in learning Korean.
explanationZh: 對某事感興趣用 be interested in,主詞是「人」要用 interested(過去分詞當形容詞)。interesting 是用來形容「事物本身令人感興趣」,主詞會是事物不是人。

sentence: I love ___ pizza on weekends.
explanationZh: love、like、enjoy、hate 後面接動詞時,動詞要加 -ing(動名詞)。所以「我愛吃 pizza」用 love eating。

sentence: We ___ to the beach last summer.
explanationZh: 句子用 last summer 表示去年夏天,是過去發生的動作,要用過去式 went。go 的過去式是 went,過去分詞才是 gone。

sentence: My brother is ___ than me.
explanationZh: 兩個人比較高矮,用「比較級」加 -er,並搭配 than。短音節形容詞 tall 直接加 -er 變 taller,不會說 more tall。

sentence: There ___ a lot of people at the party last night.
explanationZh: 主詞是複數 a lot of people,所以 be 動詞用 were。last night 表示過去,所以用過去式;單數會用 was,但 people 是複數要 were。

sentence: I'm going to ___ a new bike next month.
explanationZh: going to 後面要接「動詞原形」,表示打算做某事。所以 going to buy 才正確,不能加 -ing 或變過去式。

sentence: She was born ___ March 2005.
explanationZh: 月份、年份、季節前面用介系詞 in。on 是用在特定日期(on March 5),at 是用在時間點(at 8pm)。

sentence: He ___ used to drink coffee, but now he loves it.
explanationZh: used to 表示過去的習慣,否定形式是 didn't use to(注意要把 used 改回 use)。所以「他以前不喝咖啡」是 He didn't use to drink coffee。

sentence: The keys are ___ the table.
explanationZh: 東西放在「平面上」用 on(on the table、on the floor)。in 表示在裡面(in the box),at 表示在某點。

sentence: I don't have ___ money in my wallet.
explanationZh: money 是不可數名詞,要用 much。many 用於可數名詞複數(many books),few 也只用在可數,lot 要寫成 a lot of。

sentence: She ___ her homework every evening.
explanationZh: every evening 是現在習慣,要用簡單現在式。主詞 She 是第三人稱單數,動詞要加 -s 或 -es,所以 do → does。

sentence: Look! It ___ raining outside.
explanationZh: Look! 表示「現在正在發生」,要用現在進行式 be + V-ing。主詞 It 是單數,be 動詞用 is,所以是 It is raining。

sentence: My sister is good ___ playing the piano.
explanationZh: be good at 是固定搭配,表示「擅長某事」。後面接動詞時要用 V-ing(動名詞)。be good in 是台式英文常見錯誤。

sentence: If it rains tomorrow, we ___ stay at home.
explanationZh: 這是第一條件句:if + 現在式,主句用 will + 原形動詞,表示未來「可能發生」的情況。would 是第二條件句(假設不太可能發生)。

sentence: She speaks English ___ than her brother.
explanationZh: 句中有 than 表示兩者比較,要用比較級。well(副詞,修飾 speaks)的比較級是 better,不是 weller。best 是最高級用 the best。

sentence: I have ___ apple every morning for breakfast.
explanationZh: apple 的開頭是母音 [æ],前面冠詞要用 an,不是 a。a 用在子音開頭(a banana),an 用在母音開頭(an apple、an orange)。

sentence: He often ___ to work by bus.
explanationZh: often 是頻率副詞,表示習慣動作,用簡單現在式。主詞 He 是第三人稱單數,動詞要加 -es,所以 go → goes。

sentence: There are some books ___ the shelf.
explanationZh: 書放在「架子上(平面)」用 on。on the shelf 是固定說法,意思是「在架上」。in 表示裡面,under 表示下面。

sentence: Would you like ___ coffee?
explanationZh: 雖然 some 通常用在肯定句、any 用在疑問句,但「邀請、請求」的問句要用 some,聽起來更禮貌(我會給你的暗示)。

sentence: She is the ___ student in the class.
explanationZh: in the class 表示「在全班中」是多人比較,要用最高級 the smartest。比較兩人才用 smarter,smart 沒有 more smart 的說法。

sentence: I ___ TV when my mom called me.
explanationZh: 「過去某動作正在進行時,另一動作打斷它」要用過去進行式 was/were + V-ing。媽媽打電話來時我「正在看」電視,所以用 was watching。

sentence: My grandmother ___ live in Taipei when she was young.
explanationZh: 肯定句用 used to + 原形動詞,表示「過去的習慣或狀態」(現在已經沒了)。注意 used 有 d,但否定句 didn't use to 又會把 d 拿掉。

sentence: He is the man ___ lives next door.
explanationZh: 形容詞子句修飾「人」用 who 或 that。which 修飾「物」,where 修飾「地點」,what 不能當關係代名詞用。

sentence: There aren't ___ chairs in the room.
explanationZh: 否定句和一般疑問句用 any,肯定句才用 some。chairs 是可數複數,所以不能用 much(只用在不可數)。

sentence: What ___ you do last weekend?
explanationZh: last weekend 是過去時間,問句要用過去式助動詞 did。注意 did 後面的主要動詞要回原形,所以後面接 do(原形)。

sentence: Hurry up! The train ___ in 5 minutes.
explanationZh: 時刻表、行程表等「固定即將發生」的未來事件,英文習慣用簡單現在式(尤其是交通工具)。也可以用 is leaving 但更口語的是 leaves。

sentence: I'd like ___ tea, please.
explanationZh: tea 是不可數名詞,要用「容器+of」來計量,所以是 a cup of tea(一杯茶)。直接說 a cup 沒有指出是什麼。

sentence: He's been working here ___ 2018.
explanationZh: since 後面接「時間點」(2018、last year),for 後面接「時間長度」(for 5 years)。「從 2018 起到現在」用 since。

sentence: She has lived in Tokyo ___ five years.
explanationZh: for 後面接「時間長度」(five years、a long time),since 接時間點。「五年」是長度不是點,所以用 for。

sentence: If I ___ rich, I would travel around the world.
explanationZh: 與現在事實相反的假設,if 子句用過去式,主句用 would。be 動詞所有人稱都用 were(這是「假設語氣」的固定用法,不是文法錯誤)。

sentence: The weather is ___ today than yesterday.
explanationZh: 句中有 than 要用比較級。bad 是不規則變化:bad → worse → worst,不是加 -er 的 badder。

sentence: Can you ___ me your phone for a minute?
explanationZh: lend 是「借出」(我給你用),borrow 是「借入」(我跟你拿)。請別人把手機借給「我用」要用 lend(從對方角度)。

sentence: I want ___ a doctor when I grow up.
explanationZh: want 後面接動詞要用「to + 原形」,所以是 want to be。注意 want 不接 V-ing(這跟 love、enjoy 不同)。

sentence: She speaks ___ slowly that I can understand her easily.
explanationZh: so + 形容詞/副詞 + that 是固定句型,表示「如此...以致於」。such 後面要接名詞(such a slow speaker)。too 表示「太...無法」的負面意義。

sentence: Don't worry, I ___ help you with your bags.
explanationZh: 說話「當下臨時決定」要幫忙,用 will + 原形動詞,表示「當下的承諾或決定」。going to 是「事先計畫好」的未來。

sentence: There ___ a cat on the roof.
explanationZh: 「某地有某物」用 There is/are,不能用 have。主詞 a cat 是單數,所以 be 動詞用 is。have 是中式英文常見錯誤。

sentence: How ___ sugar do you want in your coffee?
explanationZh: sugar 是不可數名詞,問「多少」要用 How much。How many 是用在可數名詞複數(How many books)。

sentence: I ___ to the gym three times a week.
explanationZh: three times a week 是頻率,表示習慣性動作,要用簡單現在式。主詞 I 不需要動詞加 s,所以是 go(不是 goes)。

sentence: She was tired, ___ she went to bed early.
explanationZh: 「因為累所以早睡」表示因果關係,要用 so(所以)。but 是轉折,and 是並列,or 是選擇,都不符合因果邏輯。

sentence: We arrived ___ the airport at 6 a.m.
explanationZh: arrive 後面接「機場、車站、學校」這種具體地點用 at(arrive at)。arrive in 用在城市、國家(arrive in Tokyo)。注意:不能用 arrive to。

sentence: He's much ___ than his older brother.
explanationZh: 句中有 than 要用比較級 taller。much 是用來強調比較級的程度(much taller = 高很多),不是要用最高級。

sentence: I'm afraid ___ spiders.
explanationZh: be afraid of 是固定搭配,表示「害怕某物」。afraid from 是常見錯誤(直譯「從...感到害怕」),但英文要用 of。

sentence: What ___ you doing now?
explanationZh: now 表示現在,後面接 doing(V-ing)是現在進行式 be + V-ing。主詞 you 對應的 be 動詞是 are,不是 is。

sentence: She's lived here ___ she was a child.
explanationZh: since 後面可接「時間點」也可接「過去的子句」(since she was a child = 從她小時候起)。for 後面只接時間長度。

sentence: Could you please ___ the window? It's cold.
explanationZh: Could you 後面接「原形動詞」表示請求。情態助動詞(can/could/will/would 等)後面動詞一律用原形,不會變化。

sentence: My sister enjoys ___ to music while studying.
explanationZh: enjoy 後面接動詞要用 V-ing(動名詞),所以是 enjoy listening。記住 enjoy/finish/avoid/mind 後面都接 V-ing,不接 to V。

sentence: My birthday is ___ April 15.
explanationZh: 特定日期(包含日的)用 on(on April 15、on Monday)。只說月份才用 in(in April)。at 是用在時刻(at 3pm)。

sentence: He ___ never been to Japan before.
explanationZh: 現在完成式 have/has + 過去分詞,主詞 He 是第三人稱單數,助動詞要用 has。been 是 be 的過去分詞,have/has been to 是「曾經去過」。

sentence: These shoes are ___ expensive. I can't afford them.
explanationZh: too 表示「太...以致於不能...」帶有負面意義,後面常隱含 can't。very 只是「非常」,沒有「無法承受」的暗示。

sentence: Don't forget ___ the lights when you leave.
explanationZh: forget to + 原形動詞 = 忘記要做(該做還沒做)。forget V-ing 是「忘記做過(已做過)」,意思完全不同。提醒語境用 forget to。

sentence: She's ___ tired to go out tonight.
explanationZh: too + 形容詞 + to V = 太...以致於不能...,是固定句型。too tired to go out = 太累了不能出門。very tired to 沒這種用法。

sentence: We were watching a movie ___ the power went out.
explanationZh: when 接「短暫動作」(突然斷電),while 接「持續中的動作」。「正在看電影時突然斷電」突然發生用 when。during 後面只能接名詞。

sentence: This book is ___ than that one.
explanationZh: interesting 是長音節形容詞,比較級用 more interesting,不能加 -er 變 interestinger。短音節才加 -er(tall → taller)。

sentence: I'd rather stay home ___ go out tonight.
explanationZh: would rather A than B 是固定句型,意思是「寧可 A 也不要 B」。注意 A、B 都用原形動詞。than 在這裡不是比較級用,是固定搭配。

sentence: She works ___ a hospital downtown.
explanationZh: 工作場所通常用 at(at a hospital、at the office)強調「地點」。也可以用 in 強調「裡面」,但 at 更自然常用。

sentence: He doesn't like coffee, and ___ do I.
explanationZh: 前句是否定句,接「我也不」要用 neither + 助動詞 + 主詞 = neither do I。so 用在肯定句後(I like it, so does she)。

sentence: The movie was ___ . I almost fell asleep.
explanationZh: boring 形容「事物本身令人無聊」(主詞是事物),bored 形容「人感到無聊」(主詞是人)。這裡主詞是 The movie(事物),所以用 boring。

sentence: I'm looking ___ to seeing you next week.
explanationZh: look forward to + V-ing 是固定片語,表示「期待」。注意這裡的 to 是介系詞不是不定詞,所以後面要用 V-ing(seeing)。

sentence: If you ___ harder, you'll pass the exam.
explanationZh: 第一條件句:if + 現在式,主句 will + 原形動詞,表示未來可能發生。注意 if 子句不能用 will(會犯重複未來式的錯)。

sentence: She is one of the ___ singers in the country.
explanationZh: 「one of the + 最高級 + 複數名詞」是固定句型,意思是「最...之一」。good 的最高級是 best(不規則變化),不是 goodest 或 more good。

sentence: He ___ his keys yesterday and couldn't open the door.
explanationZh: yesterday 表示過去,要用過去式。lose 的過去式是 lost(不規則變化),不是 losed。

sentence: I usually have lunch ___ noon.
explanationZh: specific time(時刻、noon 中午、night 晚上)前面用 at。at noon、at midnight、at 7 o'clock 都是固定用法。

sentence: She's the girl ___ won the singing contest.
explanationZh: 關係代名詞修飾「人」用 who(也可用 that)。which 修飾物,whose 表示「...的」,what 不當關係代名詞。

sentence: There isn't ___ milk left in the fridge.
explanationZh: 否定句用 any。milk 是不可數,不能用 many(只用在可數複數)、few(也是可數)。some 通常用在肯定句。

sentence: It's raining hard. You ___ take an umbrella.
explanationZh: should 表示「應該、建議」,是給對方建議的常用語氣。would 是假設,could 是能力或可能,might 是「可能」但弱。建議用 should 最直接。

sentence: My job is ___ stressful than my last one.
explanationZh: 形容詞要表達「比較沒那麼...」用 less + 形容詞 + than(less stressful = 沒那麼有壓力)。few/little/small 都不是比較級用法。

sentence: I haven't seen him ___ Monday.
explanationZh: since 接「時間點」(Monday、2020、yesterday)。for 接「時間長度」。「從週一起到現在沒見」是從某點起,所以用 since。

sentence: She avoids ___ junk food.
explanationZh: avoid 後面接動詞要用 V-ing(動名詞),所以是 avoid eating。avoid/enjoy/finish/mind/practice 都是後接 V-ing 的動詞。

sentence: Look at those clouds! It ___ rain soon.
explanationZh: 看到「眼前徵兆」預測會發生的事,用 is going to(看到雲所以判斷會下雨)。will 較常用在「當下臨時的決定或承諾」。

sentence: My dad ___ get up early to go fishing on weekends.
explanationZh: used to + 原形動詞 = 「過去常常」(現在不再)。be used to + V-ing 是「習慣於」(現在還是)。這裡是過去習慣,用 used to。

sentence: How long ___ you been studying English?
explanationZh: How long + 現在完成進行式(have been + V-ing)= 問「從過去持續到現在多久」。後面 been studying 是線索,助動詞要用 have。

sentence: The restaurant was ___ crowded that we couldn't find a seat.
explanationZh: so + 形容詞 + that 子句 = 「如此...以致於...」。such 後要接名詞(such a crowded place),這裡 crowded 是形容詞所以用 so。

sentence: We went to Paris ___ vacation last year.
explanationZh: on vacation 是固定片語,意思是「度假中」。on holiday、on business 都是這種用法。介系詞要用 on 不是 in 或 for。

sentence: She speaks French better than ___ in our class.
explanationZh: 比較句「比任何人都好」用 anyone(任何人)。someone 是「某人」太具體,everyone 邏輯上會包括自己造成矛盾,no one 是否定意義不通。

sentence: I can't decide ___ to wear today.
explanationZh: what to + 原形動詞 = 該...什麼(what to wear = 該穿什麼)。which 要在有特定選項時才用(which dress to wear)。

sentence: If I were you, I ___ tell him the truth.
explanationZh: 「If I were you」是假設語氣(我不是你,但假設我是),主句要用 would + 原形動詞表示「我會...」。這是給建議的客氣說法。

sentence: He's been to Korea ___ times.
explanationZh: times(次數)是可數複數,要用 many。much 用在不可數(much money),a lot of 也可但這裡缺 of,every 後面只接單數。

sentence: Please be quiet. The baby ___ .
explanationZh: 「現在這個當下正在發生」要用現在進行式(be + V-ing)。Please be quiet 暗示寶寶「正在睡」,所以用 is sleeping。

sentence: We need to leave ___ , or we'll miss the train.
explanationZh: immediately 是「立刻、馬上」,符合句意(不馬上走就會錯過火車)。lately 是「最近」,yet 通常用在問句和否定,ago 是「以前」。

sentence: She made me ___ at her joke.
explanationZh: 使役動詞 make/let/have + 受詞 + 原形動詞(無 to)。所以 made me laugh,不是 made me to laugh(常見錯誤)。
